race.comment: UNDERCOVER SNIPER (3) got the job done here two back as favourite before getting too far back and not threatening last time over 1200m. Out in trip for just the second time today, though it looks to suit and the claim comes in handy. Drawn well and can get back to winning ways. SWEXAN (4) finished fourth two runs back at this track then improved last time out to score by 2.25 lengths as favourite after being in contention on the bend over 1400m at this track. No reason he cannot salute again. A LOT OF CLASS (8) was in the money two starts back at this track but couldn't back it up last time when 11th, beaten 11 lengths, at this track over 1400m. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot find winning ways. KUNAPIPI (7) has been in the placings her past two starts, finishing third over 1200m at this track last time out. Should park just off the speed. Sure to be thereabouts. THE KING'S UNCLE (1) is worth including third-up into the campaign.
